'''Imperial Arms''' was an arms company under the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. It produced mostly small holdout [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]]. One of the most popular devices to come from Imperial Arms was the [[Model 22T4 ISB Special]] [[Hold-out blaster/Legends|hold-out blaser]].
